overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a continuous walk along a sunny urban sidewalk in Los Santos. The player moves past residential houses, commercial buildings, bus stops, and various pedestrians, with palm trees and distant mountains visible under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with for-sale properties and chain link fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the residential sidewalk past houses and a for-sale sign, approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction, then passed by ego on the left side

metal chain link fence running along the residential property line
single-story suburban house with front yard and porch
tall palm tree with green fronds lining the sidewalk
wooden telephone pole with power lines running along the street
single-story yellow building with flat roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunny residential sidewalk with a for-sale sign visible on the left. The camera moves forward past chain link fences and suburban houses, overtaking a pedestrian walking ahead. Palm trees line the street and a yellow commercial building is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with yellow building and gated residential entrance

events.description: transitioning from residential houses to commercial yellow building with garage doors
passing close by a person standing at the brick gate entrance on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the yellow commercial building and a gated entrance where a person stands

notable_agents.action: standing near the brick gate entrance, appearing to look at a phone or object in hands

entered.detail: red metal roll-up garage door with graffiti tags on it
red brick pillars marking a residential entrance with metal gate

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial area with a prominent yellow building on the left featuring a red garage door with graffiti. The camera passes a gated entrance with brick pillars where a person stands looking at their phone. The utility pole moves closer on the right as the camera advances toward an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with bus stop shelter and waiting passengers

events.description: arriving at the street corner with bus stop shelter and commercial intersection
waiting at the corner as vehicles pass on the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: pausing at the street corner near the bus stop, observing traffic and waiting pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three people waiting under the red bus stop shelter

entered.detail: red roofed bus stop shelter with glass panels and bench
row of colorful newspaper and magazine vending machines
multi-story commercial buildings with billboards across the intersection
concrete park bench on the sidewalk near the corner
green electrical utility box on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at a busy street corner featuring a red bus stop shelter where several people are waiting. Newspaper vending machines line the right side of the sidewalk. The scene opens up to a wide intersection with commercial buildings and billboards visible across the street, while traffic moves along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial strip with storefronts and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: passing a pedestrian in a suit walking in the opposite direction
passing colorful graffiti murals on the white building wall

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts, passing pedestrians walking in opposing directions and observing graffiti art on the walls

notable_agents.action: person leaning against the white building wall near the storefront
pedestrian in a gray suit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: white painted commercial building with metal security bars on windows
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art in red and purple
large green metal dumpster with yellow warning labels

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along a commercial strip with white storefronts featuring metal security bars. The camera passes a person leaning against the wall and encounters a pedestrian in a suit walking in the opposite direction. Colorful graffiti covers the building walls, and a green dumpster sits on the right side of the sidewalk near the curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk that transitions from a quiet residential neighborhood into a bustling commercial urban strip. It begins on a sunny sidewalk past suburban houses and a for-sale sign, moving forward under palm trees as the camera overtakes a pedestrian. As the environment shifts toward a commercial zone, the camera passes a prominent yellow building with a graffiti-covered red garage door and a gated brick entrance. The scene then opens up at a busy street corner featuring a red bus stop shelter and newspaper vending machines, revealing a wide intersection filled with traffic and billboards. Finally, the camera continues along a strip of white storefronts with metal security bars, passing colorful graffiti and a green dumpster while encountering pedestrians on the sidewalk.
